item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the fourth overlay request, frames the entrance-page note as an unsafe default, and moves upstream to the repeated failure pattern across appointment, documents, queueing, and rescheduling. Although it offers a one-time emergency wording, it constrains it as temporary and proposes consolidation/flow redesign within seven working days, so it is not merely adding the next explanatory layer."}
